object_replacement.source_prompt: A fluffy cat sitting in front of a mirror in a bathroom
object_replacement.target_prompt: A tiger sitting in front of a mirror in a bathroom
object_replacement.instruction: Turn the cat into a tiger

attribute_modification.source_prompt: A red car parked on the street
attribute_modification.target_prompt: A blue car parked on the street
attribute_modification.instruction: Change the car color to blue

non_rigid_action.source_prompt: A cute dog standing on the grass
non_rigid_action.target_prompt: A cute dog sitting on the grass

style_transfer.source_prompt: A beautiful landscape of a mountain during the day
style_transfer.target_prompt: A beautiful landscape of a mountain during the night

reasoning.source_prompt: A man wearing a casual t-shirt
reasoning.target_prompt: A man going to a formal funeral
reasoning.instruction: Make him look like he is going to a formal funeral
